headline: Clear calendar and quiet comms — ideal day to drive the 'no ground truth' evaluations design doc forward before the next bi-weekly TR.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake auth so tomorrow's brief has live metrics
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken; you're flying blind on escalations and adoption data

must_make_progress.task: Draft or substantially advance the 'Generated evaluations - no ground truth' design doc (AE-1079)
must_make_progress.why: Only active ticket on your board; evals is a key 26.4 deliverable called out in the Big Rock TR, and no due date means it could drift — use today's empty calendar to get a first pass done

must_make_progress.task: Review latest Big Rock TR page for any action items or updates you owe before next bi-weekly
must_make_progress.why: Evals, Context Engineering, and Templates/Patterns are all in-flight; ensure your design doc aligns with latest direction from Adrian, Jordan, and Dragos

must_communicate_with.about: Align on how 'no ground truth' evals intersect with DeepRAG/BatchTransform validation patterns and Context Engineering work
Get input on evaluation methodology for generated evals without ground truth — likely need their modeling perspective

flags: Salesforce auth is broken (INVALID_LOGIN) — open escalations are invisible. Fix urgently or escalate to IT.
Snowflake password is empty — all product telemetry and funnel metrics are unavailable.
AE-1079 has no due date set; risk of it slipping without a self-imposed target. Consider setting one today.
Autopilot is flagged Yellow/Risk in the Big Rock TR — monitor for spillover impact on evals work.

outcomes.business_impact: No measurable business impact yet today — priority is restoring visibility into escalations (Salesforce) and metrics (Snowflake) so decisions aren't made blind.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption data is unavailable; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079) is the highest-leverage adoption-driving work today, as it unblocks a key 26.4 deliverable.

slack_summary: Clear calendar today — best use of time is driving the 'no ground truth' evaluations design doc (AE-1079), your only active Jira ticket and a key 26.4 deliverable. Urgent housekeeping: both Salesforce and Snowflake integrations are broken, leaving you blind on escalations and adoption metrics — get those fixed or escalated. Zero meetings today.
